subtypes.name: Direct Prompt Injection
subtypes.description: Attacker directly manipulates LLM input to override system instructions

subtypes.name: Indirect Prompt Injection
subtypes.description: Malicious instructions embedded in external data sources consumed by LLM

subtypes.name: Stored Prompt Injection
subtypes.description: Persistent injection via databases or documents retrieved by RAG pipelines

subtypes.name: Role-Play Jailbreak
subtypes.description: Persuading model to adopt unrestricted persona (DAN, AIM)

subtypes.name: Crescendo Attack
subtypes.description: Multi-turn gradual escalation to bypass safety filters

subtypes.name: PAIR Attack
subtypes.description: Prompt Automatic Iterative Refinement using attacker LLM

subtypes.name: Many-Shot Jailbreak
subtypes.description: Exploiting long context windows with many examples of undesired behavior

subtypes.name: Tree-of-Attacks
subtypes.description: Branching attack strategies with pruning for optimal jailbreak paths

subtypes.name: Cipher/Encoding
subtypes.description: Using Base64, ROT13, or custom ciphers to obfuscate harmful requests

subtypes.name: PII Extraction
subtypes.description: Extracting personally identifiable information from model training data

subtypes.name: System Prompt Leakage
subtypes.description: Techniques to reveal hidden system prompts and instructions

subtypes.name: Training Data Extraction
subtypes.description: Recovering verbatim training data through targeted prompting

subtypes.name: RAG Poisoning Exfiltration
subtypes.description: Manipulating retrieval to expose private documents

subtypes.name: Stereotyping Elicitation
subtypes.description: Prompts designed to produce biased stereotypes about protected groups

subtypes.name: Demographic Disparity
subtypes.description: Testing for unequal treatment across demographic attributes

subtypes.name: Representational Harm
subtypes.description: Eliciting outputs that demean or erase specific populations

subtypes.name: Factual Hallucination Induction
subtypes.description: Forcing model to generate confident but false factual claims

subtypes.name: Citation Fabrication
subtypes.description: Inducing fake academic citations or legal references

subtypes.name: Entity Confusion
subtypes.description: Exploiting model confusion between similar named entities

subtypes.name: Hate Speech Generation
subtypes.description: Eliciting hateful or discriminatory language targeting groups

subtypes.name: Violence Incitement
subtypes.description: Producing content that encourages or instructs harmful acts

subtypes.name: Self-Harm Content
subtypes.description: Generating content related to self-harm or suicide methods

subtypes.name: Unauthorized Tool Invocation
subtypes.description: Manipulating agents to call tools or APIs beyond intended scope

subtypes.name: Privilege Escalation
subtypes.description: Gaining elevated permissions through agentic workflows

subtypes.name: Chain-of-Command Hijacking
subtypes.description: Redirecting multi-agent pipelines to execute attacker objectives

subtypes.name: Adversarial Image Injection
subtypes.description: Embedding text instructions in images to bypass text filters

subtypes.name: Audio Prompt Injection
subtypes.description: Hidden commands in audio inputs for speech-enabled models

subtypes.name: Cross-Modal Transfer
subtypes.description: Exploiting inconsistencies between vision and language understanding
